CustomField.description: Auto-calculated. The total of the income sources provided where Do Not Incude in Eligibility Income is not checked, divided by the AMI for Household Size.
CustomField.formula: IF(AND( HOMEtracker__Annual_Income_Eligibility__c > 0, HOMEtracker__AMI_for_Family_Size__c > 0), HOMEtracker__Annual_Income_Eligibility__c / HOMEtracker__AMI_for_Family_Size__c , NULL)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-calculated. The total of the income sources provided where Do Not Incude in Eligibility Income is not checked, divided by the AMI for Household Size.
CustomField.label: Percent of AMI (Eligibility)
